title: Koekäyttö: CINAHL Ultimate 30.6.2026 asti
content:
On Trial: CINAHL Ultimate until 30.6.2026

krlahdes@helsinki.fi Wed, 06/05/2026 - 14:30
University of Helsinki has access to the CINAHL Ultimate -database until the end of June.

CINAHL Ultimate is the full-text database for nursing and allied health research. It offers full-text access to a substantial portion of the most frequently cited journals in the CINAHL index. Providing 1,867 active full-text journals valued at.

title: A digital iron curtain? How an app is bolting Russia shut
content:
A digital iron curtain? How an app is bolting Russia shut

turmaija@helsinki.fi Wed, 06/05/2026 - 11:05
Russia's new messenger app Max signals the Kremlin's most ambitious push yet to seal off its citizens from the free internet, raising the question of whether a digital iron curtain is eventually becoming a reality.

Imagine buying a new phone, but there is a catch: a pre-installed and government-controlled app that tracks your activity

title: Welcome to Irritation Seminar and Prof. Anni Kajanus' Inaugural Lecture
content:
Welcome to Irritation Seminar and Prof. Anni Kajanus' Inaugural Lecture

riiksara@helsinki.fi Tue, 05/05/2026 - 22:30
Welcome on 26–27 May 2026 to IRRITATION Seminar and New Professors’ Inaugural Lectures!
On 26th of May, the final seminar of the Irritation project will take place at Topelia building.
On 27th of May, the university celebrates its new professors, including Professor of Social and Cultural Anthropology, Anni Kajanus.

title: Food Days 2026 suuntaa katseen tulevaisuuden ruokaan ja vientiin
content:
Food Days 2026 focuses on the future of food and exports

heivali@helsinki.fi Tue, 05/05/2026 - 14:19
The international Food Days event will once again be held in Seinäjoki on 30 September – 1 October 2026. The event brings together food businesses, researchers and developers from Finland and abroad to discuss the future of food, food exports, RDI activities, and business development.

title: Tulevaisuuden läpimurtoja tehdään lahjoittajien tuella – yli 350 apurahaa ja stipendiä opiskelijoille ja tutkijoille
content:
Breakthroughs of the future are made with donors’ support – over 350 grants and scholarships awarded to students and researchers

sholttin@helsinki.fi Tue, 05/05/2026 - 12:44
This spring, over 350 grants, scholarships, and awards from the University’s own funds were awarded to students and researchers at the University of Helsinki. The distribution of support is made possible by donors, as the funds are based on donations made to the University.

title: Arkadiankadun siltaremontti aiheuttaa muutoksia liikennejärjestelyihin Luonnontieteellisen museon lähistöllä
content:
Renewal of Arkadiankatu Bridge will cause changes to traffic arrangements near the Natural History Museum

johanemi@helsinki.fi Wed, 07/01/2026 - 08:40
The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

The renovation will start with the construction of temporary traffic arrangements from Wednesday 7 January onwards. The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

title: Vesivälitteiset taudit kuriin – uusi menetelmä tunnistaa vesistöjen saastumisen lähteen
content:
Keeping waterborne diseases in check – A new method identifies waterway contamination sources

lindymar@helsinki.fi Wed, 06/05/2026 - 14:35
Wastewater and agricultural runoffs are known to contaminate surface waters, but specific sources of contamination often remain unknown. A recently completed doctoral thesis developed a method for tracing contaminants using genetic markers.
